title: CHMod
description: A simple Moderation plugin that blocks swear words.
body:
## A Pretty simple Hungarian moderation plugin what blocks the swear words
### Commands
- /chmod be - Turns on the moderation
- /chmod ki - Turns off the moderation
- /cchat, /clearchat - Clears the chat
### Permissions:
- chmod.bypass - Bypasses the swear system
- chmod.clearchat.use - Allows to clear the chat
- chmod.see - Allows you to see the alerts.
- chmod.use - Allows to execute the command: /chmod be, /chmod ki
### Languages, messages:
- Change the messages at messages.yml
- Change the language from Hungarian to English: lang_en.yml
### 1.1.2 version updates: 
- Fixed bypass permission
